topic_title: try / except — handling errors gracefully without crashing
verdict: PASS — intent fully covered. 5-node TD flowchart (within atomic 5–7 range). Decision diamond 'exception raised?' with yes/no labeled edges produces clear error-path (except, red) vs success-path (else, green) branching. Both paths converge at 'program continues' (purple). Title rendered as header. Project palette applied correctly. All labels plain-language, scope clean to 12.8 concepts only.

node_count.note: TRY, RAISED (diamond), EXCEPT, ELSE, CONT — exactly on intent, minimal and clear.

label_clarity.note: All labels beginner-readable: 'try block / code that might fail', 'exception raised?', 'except block / handle the error', 'else block / optional — only runs on success', 'program continues / after try/except'. No undefined acronyms.

intent_coverage.intent: Flowchart: try block → exception raised? → yes: except block → else skipped; no: else block (optional) → both paths continue after try/except structure
intent_coverage.note: Yes branch → EXCEPT, no branch → ELSE, both → CONT. Intent mapped 1:1.

scope_discipline.note: No advanced nodes (finally, raise, custom exceptions, logging). Exactly the 5 concepts taught in 12.8.
